title: A dc rechargeable battery powered appliance purposed to remove a thin 0uter layer of skin from vegetables and fruits
abstract: A dc rechargeable, battery powered, food preparation device uses rapid angular displacement action thereby enabling a human operator to use barely more than the weight of the instrument's spinning cutter against a wide variety of fruit and vegetable peels ranging from dense eggplant to delicate peach, while also providing for operator safety through the use of safe-start interlock technology along with a catch-and-release safety cover over the cutting head itself. As a result the user friendly appliance scales the entire surface of common produce items while rapidly and efficiently removing the outer layer of skin in bitwise fashion as opposed to generating continuous long strings of discard material.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. An appliance for peeling vegetables and fruits having a lower base, a central handle and an upper cutting head roller, comprising: a) a base configured for electrical charging and storage, b) a handle housing configured for a person's hand, c) a variable speed angular displacement drive coupled to a cutting head roller mechanism having an horizontal axis of rotation, d) a floating torque coupling device connected between said proximal and distal ends of said cutting head roller mechanism's said horizontal axis of rotation. 2. The appliance of claim 1 wherein said variable-speed angular displacement drive comprises a linear dc motor being positioned adjacent to said handle housing and solidly engaged with said cutting head roller mechanism's said horizontal axis of rotation. 3. The appliance of claim 2 wherein said proximal and distal ends of said cutting head roller mechanism's said horizontal axis of rotation are movablv connected to the vertical sides of said handle housing. 4. The appliance of claim 1 wherein said floating torque coupling device comprises a four-wire assembly purposed to provide torque transmission between two axial shaft stubs while also enabling flex-head operation of said cutting head roller mechanism. 5. The appliance of claim 1 wherein said handle housing further comprises a spring 

 loaded safety cover, a safety cover release mechanism, a roller assembly dust cover and a pair of sleeve bearings. 6. The appliance of claim 1 wherein said base further comprises a charger assembly consisting of an ac adapter unit, an ac adapter cord with integrated plug and an ac adapter integrated socket built into said base. 7. The appliance of claim 1 wherein said handle housing further comprises a 7.4V 900mAh 15C LiPo rechargeable battery, a TL431 band gap voltage reference charge controller CCA, an LM741 op amp variable speed motor controller CCA, a flush mounted thumb-operated on-off switch, a flush mounted thumb-operated speed control switch and a 9- element LED multi-colored instrument illumination strip, 8. A method based upon the use of a rotary assisted, battery powered appliance in removing a thin outer layer of skin ranging between .001"/.012" from vegetables and fruits, whereby with the processing item being grasped in the first hand and said handle housing being held in the second hand, said processing item and said cutting head roller mechanism may be brought together such that said cutting head roller mechanism may be directed to engage the surface of said processing item at varying degrees of elevation, thereby facilitating manual control of the cutting depth and width due to the elliptical shape of said cutting head roller mechanism.
